.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a new environment variable for admin emails to the sample configuration file.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the Docker container to support Storybook development server.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not fully support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Java source and target version to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 11, failing to utilize or comply with Java 17 features/requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jacoco-maven-plugin for test coverage reporting.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add imports for Java Collections and Spring Security classes required by the new role mapping logic.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for classes like ArrayList, HashSet, GrantedAuthoritiesMapper, etc.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add imports for application-specific entities, repositories, and Lombok logging.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for User, UserRepository, and log.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add Slf4j annotation to enable logging in the configuration class.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol 'log' if used without annotation or field declaration.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject admin emails configuration property into the security config.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol 'adminEmails' if used in methods without declaration.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.after:
@Value("${app.admin.emails}")
  private final List<String> adminEmails = new ArrayList<String>();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject UserRepository dependency to allow database lookups for user roles.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol 'userRepository' if used in methods without declaration.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Configure OAuth2 login to use a custom user authorities mapper for role assignment.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol 'userAuthoritiesMapper' if referenced in lambda without method definition.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Implement custom GrantedAuthoritiesMapper to assign roles based on email domain and admin list.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: method 'userAuthoritiesMapper' is not defined in class.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Implement helper method to check if a user is an admin based on config or database.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: method 'isAdmin' is not defined in class.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add import for the new CurrentUser model class used in the updated API controller.
Rename the currentUser method to getUser to align with the service layer API change.
Add a new getCurrentUser method to expose the richer CurrentUser object from the service.
Add Swagger annotations to document the REST API endpoint.
Add Swagger class-level annotation to describe the API resource.
Refactor controller to use a dedicated CurrentUser model and service instead of the generic User entity.
Update request mapping to reflect the new base path for the current user endpoint.
Add Swagger operation annotation to document the specific endpoint.
Change authorization check from a custom SpEL expression to a standard role-based check.
Update the endpoint path to be relative to the new controller base path.
Rename the endpoint method and change its return type to the new CurrentUser model.
Add new fields to the User entity to support Google OAuth2 user profile information.
Add an admin flag to the User entity to support role-based access control.
Remove the isMember method which derived membership status from the email domain.
Remove unused Lombok import that is no longer needed after refactoring the service interface.
Add import for the new CurrentUser model class used in the updated interface.
Replace unused Map import with Collection import required for the new getRoles method signature.
Add import for Spring Security GrantedAuthority to support the new getRoles return type.
Rename abstract method get() to getUser() for clarity and consistency.
Add new abstract method to retrieve the full CurrentUser object.
Add new abstract method to retrieve user roles as a collection of GrantedAuthority.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.after: public abstract Collection<? extends GrantedAuthority> getRoles();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Update isLoggedIn implementation to call the renamed getUser() method.
Remove the isMember() method as its functionality is likely consolidated into the CurrentUser model or removed.
Replace deprecated Lombok @Log annotation with @Slf4j for SLF4J logging support.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: The @Log annotation generates a java.util.logging.Logger which may be incompatible with the project's logging configuration or removed in favor of SLF4J in newer Spring Boot setups; @Slf4j is the standard for SLF4J.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Remove unused Lombok @Delegate import.
Add necessary imports for new functionality (CurrentUser model, Spring Security authorities, Java Collections).
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for CurrentUser, GrantedAuthority, List, Optional, etc.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Inject admin emails configuration property.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for @Value or the field adminEmails if not declared.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.after:
@Value("${app.admin.emails}")
final private List<String> adminEmails = new ArrayList<String>();

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Refactor get() method to getUser() and expand logic to handle more OAuth2 attributes and admin status.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: method signature change and usage of new fields (googleSub, pictureUrl, etc.) that did not exist in the previous User builder or logic.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.after:
public User getUser() {
  ...
  String googleSub = oAuthUser.getAttribute("sub");
  ...
  User u = User.builder()
      .googleSub(googleSub)
      .email(email)
      .pictureUrl(pictureUrl)
      .fullName(fullName)
      .givenName(givenName)
      .familyName(familyName)
      .emailVerified(emailVerified)
      .locale(locale)
      .hostedDomain(hostedDomain)
      .admin(adminEmails.contains(email))
      .build();
  ...
}

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add getCurrentUser() method to return a CurrentUser object containing user and roles.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: method getCurrentUser is called elsewhere but not defined here.

src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add getRoles() method to retrieve authorities from the security context.
src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.why_exists: Compilation error: method getRoles is called elsewhere but not defined here.

src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Rename the mock bean field to follow Java naming conventions (camelCase for variables).
Remove the explicit 'name' attribute from @MockBean since the field name now matches the bean name.
Update the mock stubbing to use the new field name and the renamed method.
Replace manual login helper with Spring Security's @WithMockUser annotation for cleaner test setup.
Remove test case for non-UCSB email login which is no longer relevant or supported by the new authentication logic.
Add MockBean for UserRepository to satisfy dependency injection requirements in the test context.
Update imports to include Spring Security test support and remove unused entity import.
